title: Vanity: Invisible Armory
description: For when you want to be d̶r̶i̶p̶l̶e̶s̶s humble...
body:
# 🪞Vanity: Invisible Armory
A **[Vanity: Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanity-core)** Addon for those who want to be a little more discrete, or have the best visibility.

The sole Design, **Invisibility**, has a chance to be available as a trade from the Stylist Villager.

### The items that can currently be turned **Invisible** are:
- Armor (Helmets / Chestplates / Leggings / Boots)
- Elytra
- Shields
- Totems of Undying
- Horse Armor
